auth.label: API Key
auth.description: NASA API key passed as the api_key query parameter on api.nasa.gov endpoints. Generate your own key from the NASA Open APIs portal: https://api.nasa.gov/.

actions.name: browse_neo
actions.description: Browse NASA's near-Earth object catalog with pagination support.

page.description: The zero-based page number to browse.

size.description: The number of near-Earth objects to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for browsing NASA's near-Earth object catalog.

self.description: The link for the current NASA response.

next.description: The link for the next page of results.

previous.description: The link for the previous page of results.

prev.description: The link for the previous page of results.

size.description: The page size returned by NASA.

totalElements.description: The total number of near-Earth objects.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages in the catalog.

page.description: Pagination metadata for the browse response.

neoReferenceId.description: The NASA near-Earth object reference identifier.

nameLimited.description: The shortened asteroid name when NASA provides one.

designation.description: The asteroid designation reported by NASA.

nasaJplUrl.description: The NASA JPL reference URL for the asteroid.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

kilometers.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

meters.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

miles.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

feet.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameter.description: Estimated asteroid diameter ranges across standard units.

isPotentiallyHazardousAsteroid.description: Whether NASA marks the asteroid as potentially hazardous.

closeApproachDate.description: The close approach date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

closeApproachDateFull.description: The close approach timestamp in NASA's detailed string format.

epochDateCloseApproach.description: The close approach timestamp as Unix time in milliseconds.

kilometersPerSecond.description: Relative velocity in kilometers per second.

kilometersPerHour.description: Relative velocity in kilometers per hour.

milesPerHour.description: Relative velocity in miles per hour.

relativeVelocity.description: Relative velocity metrics for a close approach event.

astronomical.description: The miss distance in astronomical units.

lunar.description: The miss distance in lunar distances.

missDistance.description: Miss distance metrics for a close approach event.

orbitingBody.description: The body the asteroid is approaching.

items.description: A single close approach event for a near-Earth object.

closeApproachData.description: The asteroid close approach history returned by NASA.

additionalProperties.description: Any JSON value returned by NASA.

orbitalData.description: A JSON-like object returned by NASA.

self.description: The link for the current NASA response.

next.description: The link for the next page of results.

previous.description: The link for the previous page of results.

prev.description: The link for the previous page of results.

isSentryObject.description: Whether the asteroid is present in NASA's Sentry risk table.

sentryDataUrl.description: The NASA Sentry URL for the asteroid.

items.description: Normalized near-Earth object metadata.

nearEarthObjects.description: The near-Earth objects returned for the requested browse page.

outputSchema.description: A paginated browse response for NASA's near-Earth object catalog.

actions.name: get_apod
actions.description: Retrieve NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day metadata for a specific date or the current day.

date.description: The APOD date to retrieve in YYYY-MM-DD format.

hd.description: Whether to request the high-resolution APOD image URL when NASA provides one.

thumbs.description: Whether to request a video thumbnail URL when the APOD entry is a video.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day.

date.description: The APOD entry date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

title.description: The title of the astronomy picture or video.

explanation.description: The explanatory text describing the APOD entry.

url.description: The URL of the APOD image or video.

mediaType.description: The media type returned by the APOD API.

serviceVersion.description: The APOD API service version reported by NASA.

hdUrl.description: The high-resolution image URL when NASA provides one.

thumbnailUrl.description: The thumbnail URL returned for video APOD entries when thumbs=true.

copyright.description: The copyright notice when the APOD entry is not in the public domain.

additionalProperties.description: Any JSON value returned by NASA.

concepts.description: A JSON-like object returned by NASA.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Astronomy Picture of the Day metadata.

actions.name: get_donki_cme
actions.description: Retrieve DONKI coronal mass ejection events for a date range.

startDate.description: The inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: The inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving DONKI CME events.

additionalProperties.description: Any JSON value returned by NASA.

items.description: A JSON-like object returned by NASA.
The DONKI coronal mass ejection events returned by NASA.

actions.name: get_donki_cme_analysis
actions.description: Retrieve DONKI coronal mass ejection analysis entries with optional accuracy and catalog filters.

startDate.description: The inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: The inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

mostAccurateOnly.description: Whether to return only the most accurate CME analysis entries.

completeEntryOnly.description: Whether to return only complete CME analysis entries when NASA supports the filter.

speed.description: The minimum CME speed in kilometers per second.

halfAngle.description: The minimum CME half-angle in degrees.

catalog.description: The DONKI CME analysis catalog filter.

keyword.description: The optional DONKI keyword filter for CME analysis.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving DONKI CME analysis entries.

additionalProperties.description: Any JSON value returned by NASA.

items.description: A JSON-like object returned by NASA.
The DONKI CME analysis entries returned by NASA.

actions.name: get_neo_lookup
actions.description: Lookup a specific NASA near-Earth object by asteroid id.

asteroidId.description: The NASA JPL SPK-ID of the asteroid to look up.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for looking up a single near-Earth object by asteroid id.

neoReferenceId.description: The NASA near-Earth object reference identifier.

nameLimited.description: The shortened asteroid name when NASA provides one.

designation.description: The asteroid designation reported by NASA.

nasaJplUrl.description: The NASA JPL reference URL for the asteroid.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

kilometers.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

meters.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

miles.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

feet.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

estimatedDiameter.description: Estimated asteroid diameter ranges across standard units.

isPotentiallyHazardousAsteroid.description: Whether NASA marks the asteroid as potentially hazardous.

closeApproachDate.description: The close approach date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

closeApproachDateFull.description: The close approach timestamp in NASA's detailed string format.

epochDateCloseApproach.description: The close approach timestamp as Unix time in milliseconds.

kilometersPerSecond.description: Relative velocity in kilometers per second.

kilometersPerHour.description: Relative velocity in kilometers per hour.

milesPerHour.description: Relative velocity in miles per hour.

relativeVelocity.description: Relative velocity metrics for a close approach event.

astronomical.description: The miss distance in astronomical units.

lunar.description: The miss distance in lunar distances.

missDistance.description: Miss distance metrics for a close approach event.

orbitingBody.description: The body the asteroid is approaching.

items.description: A single close approach event for a near-Earth object.

closeApproachData.description: The asteroid close approach history returned by NASA.

additionalProperties.description: Any JSON value returned by NASA.

orbitalData.description: A JSON-like object returned by NASA.

self.description: The link for the current NASA response.

next.description: The link for the next page of results.

previous.description: The link for the previous page of results.

prev.description: The link for the previous page of results.

isSentryObject.description: Whether the asteroid is present in NASA's Sentry risk table.

sentryDataUrl.description: The NASA Sentry URL for the asteroid.

outputSchema.description: The detailed NASA near-Earth object lookup response.

actions.name: search_near_earth_objects
actions.description: Search NASA near-Earth objects by closest approach date within a maximum 7-day window.

startDate.description: The start date for the close approach search in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: The end date for the close approach search in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching near-Earth objects by close approach date.

self.description: The link for the current NASA response.

next.description: The link for the next page of results.

previous.description: The link for the previous page of results.

prev.description: The link for the previous page of results.

elementCount.description: The total number of asteroid close approaches returned.

neoReferenceId.description: The NASA near-Earth object reference identifier.

nameLimited.description: The shortened asteroid name when NASA provides one.

designation.description: The asteroid designation reported by NASA.

nasaJplUrl.description: The NASA JPL reference URL for the asteroid.

estimatedDiameterMin.description: The minimum estimated diameter for the unit.

estimatedDiameterMax.description: The maximum estimated diameter for the unit.

kilometers.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

feet.description: Estimated diameter range for a specific unit.

isPotentiallyHazardousAsteroid.description: Whether NASA marks the asteroid as potentially hazardous.

closeApproachDate.description: The close approach date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

closeApproachDateFull.description: The close approach timestamp in NASA's detailed string format.

epochDateCloseApproach.description: The close approach timestamp as Unix time in milliseconds.

kilometersPerSecond.description: Relative velocity in kilometers per second.

milesPerHour.description: Relative velocity in miles per hour.

relativeVelocity.description: Relative velocity metrics for a close approach event.

astronomical.description: The miss distance in astronomical units.

lunar.description: The miss distance in lunar distances.

missDistance.description: Miss distance metrics for a close approach event.

orbitingBody.description: The body the asteroid is approaching.
